rows.notes: Top-of-page title/header is partially faded and the script is ornate. I transcribed as closely as possible to the visible letters but several words (esp. the second word and some Latin/abbrev.) are unclear.
Description legible as 'Weston ad Test: annua'. Numeric columns well aligned; pounds 4, shillings 14, pence 4 are clear.
Leading dash indicates continuation; description reads '- ad Test Mich'. Numbers read 4 | 2 | 4 with good column alignment and clear digits.
Description 'Place Hill pro Bien' reasonably clear. Amounts 17/2/9 are clearly aligned and digits are distinct.

rows.description: Yardington Recd: pro Bien. an: ad Mich:
rows.notes: Description has several abbreviations; read as 'Yardington Recd: pro Bien. an: ad Mich:'. Amount 5/0/0 is clear in the columns.
Description 'Tenam: pro an:' is somewhat abbreviated but legible. Amount columns show 8 | 14 | 5 with a small halfpenny mark after pence (interpreted as 0.5). Alignment of fraction is clear.
Handwriting for the name is uncertain ('Wilmet?' guessed). Numeric 5/0/10 reads clearly from columns. Description uncertainty lowers confidence.
Sub-item (leading dash) reads '- Capon pro ditto' clearly. Amounts 0 | 6 | 3 are well aligned and digits distinct.

Description 'Kidlington Mills pro an:' readable. Amount columns show 15 | 19 | 3 with a small mark after the 3 interpreted as three‑quarters (0.75). The fractional symbol is slightly stylized but consistent with 3/4.
Place name partly unclear ('Gassing?ton'). Numbers 6/19/8 are clear. Uncertainty in transcription of the place name lowers confidence.
Name is difficult to read ('Mohnexx' is a best reading of the script). Amounts 6/19/8 are clearly written and aligned.
Description approximated as 'Tintinhalle Keeper pro Bien' (script ambiguous). Amount 10 | 9 | 11 with a small quarter‑pence mark (1/4) is visible and was interpreted as 0.25.
Sub-item reads '- Holwake pro ditto' fairly clearly. Amounts 1/15/0 align well and digits are distinct.
Description 'Clifton Ferry' readable. Amounts 26 | 14 | 6 with a visible halfpenny mark (interpreted as 0.5). Fraction mark slightly faint but consistent with halfpence.
Several abbreviations in description but read as 'South New: Tenem: pro an:'. Numeric 2/1/4 is clear in the right columns.
Name 'Bennington' legible. Amounts 5/9/7 with a halfpenny mark after pence (0.5) are clearly visible.
Place name uncertain ('Lodicane Coursy' is a best effort). Numeric 3/6/8 is clearly written. Name uncertainty reduces confidence.
Sub-item reads '- Harforth pro ditto' reasonably clearly. Amounts 6/13/4 align well and digits are legible.
Sub-item '- Greenhow pro ditto' fairly legible. Amount 1/13/4 is clear in the columns.
Name and abbreviations partly uncertain ('Taylor mayor Est' is a best reading). Amount 5/14/3 is clear. Description uncertainty lowers confidence.
Personal/place names (Sinden, olin Calett?) are hard to decipher; amounts 4/9/3 with a halfpenny (0.5) mark are visible. Name uncertainty lowers confidence.
Names very uncertain ('Minchin, olin Barnett?' best effort). Numeric 0 | 15 | 9 with a faint quarter‑pence mark interpreted as 0.25. Fraction identification is slightly faint.

rows.description: Little Gen Quit Rents pro an:
rows.notes: Description approximated as 'Little Gen Quit Rents'. Amounts 3/6/8 are distinct and columns are well aligned.
Place name uncertain ('Curnock West?' guessed). Amount reads 0/0/6 clearly. Name uncertainty reduces confidence.
Description 'Longwittenham pro an:' reasonably clear. Large pounds figure 85 /0/1 is very clear and columns line up well.

rows.description: Southnewington Recd pro Prin: an: ad Mich:
rows.notes: Description fairly legible as 'Southnewington Recd pro Prin: an: ad Mich:'. Amount 30/0/0 is clear in numeric columns.
Likely 'Grosvenor for Quadrin? & 1/2 part: an:' — name/words uncertain. Pounds 255 /0/0 are clear; description uncertainty lowers confidence.
Reads as 'Sharp annuity pro Trin: & Dim:' though the second abbreviation uncertain. Amount 17/10/0 is clearly written.
Place 'Bampton pro Bien' legible. Amount 2/0/0 is clear in columns.
Final line reads as a place 'Mountcarlte?' (very uncertain). Amount 1/0/0 is clear; the place name is ambiguous so confidence reduced.
